positive: A stylized, whimsical depiction of a friendly forest spirit sitting cross-legged in a circle of giant glowing mushrooms. The spirit has soft, flowing robes and a gentle smile, surrounded by bioluminescent flora and delicate, curling vines. The overall style is modern Nordic folk art mixed with high-contrast woodcut etching. Use rich jewel tones (deep sapphire blue, emerald green, amethyst purple) contrasted against stark, creamy white highlights. Composition must be symmetrical and centered for optimal apparel placement. Strong, visible silhouettes, clean linework, and a sense of harmonious symmetry. Flat graphic design aesthetic suitable for screen printing.
